zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Frowicke於大約1464年出生在英國肯特比曉普斯布恩時，她的父親Thomas Frowick42歲，母親Joan Sturgeon39歲。她於1482年與Thomas Haute在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年1月17日在她的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel Frowicke于大约1464年出生在英国肯特比曉普斯布恩时，她的父亲Thomas Frowick42岁，母亲Joan Sturgeon39岁。她于1482年与Thomas Haute在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年1月17日在她的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Frowicke was born about 1464, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Frowick, was 42 and her mother, Joan Sturgeon, was 39. She married Thomas Haute in 1482, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 17 January 1516, in her hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Frowicke est née environ 1464, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Frowick, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan Sturgeon, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Haute en 1482, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 janvier 1516, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Frowicke um 1464 in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Frowick 42 und ihre Mutter Joan Sturgeon 39. Sie hat 1482 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Thomas Haute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Januar 1516 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Frowicke è nata il circa 1464 nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas Frowick, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Joan Sturgeon, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Haute nel 1482, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1516, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Frowickeが約1464年にイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Frowickは42歳，母Joan Sturgeonは39歳であった。1482年にイギリスイギリスケントでThomas Hauteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年1月17日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 올잉 스트 마이'스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Frowicke(이)가 대략 1464년 영국 켄트 비숍스번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Frowick(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Sturgeon(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Thomas Haute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 1월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Frowicke nasceu aproximadamente 1464, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Frowick, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan Sturgeon, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Haute em 1482, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1516, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: ст мэри'с, эалинг, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Frowicke родилась около 1464 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Frowick было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Sturgeon, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Haute в 1482 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 17 января 1516 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Haute en 1482, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1516, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
